subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Ranked No. 2 on DeepResearch Bench: Achieved a comprehensive score of 51.86 on the authoritative benchmark, with a gap of less than 1.5% from first place
- Reduce 95% of manual research workload: Automates data collection and information integration, significantly improving research efficiency
- Reports generated in <=15 minutes: Rapidly outputs structured research documents and supports batch generation
- Supports open-source large models: Uses cost-effective foundation models such as GLM-4.7, lowering overall cost

subsections.title: Demo
content: **[Download is not currently supported for this type of content]**
(Expected outcome preview. Video material is from [DeerFlow] produced by ByteDance.)

subsections.title: 2.1 Overview
content: **Business Background**: Intelligent research tasks are widely used in scenarios such as competitive and industry research, supervision and review, and training and learning across industries including finance and trade, consulting and management, public policy, marketing, and enterprise operations. The demand is broad and the usage frequency is extremely high.

**Solution**: Based on the research topic and keywords entered by the user, this example automatically collects relevant materials, performs knowledge extraction and integration through intelligent workflows, and finally generates and outputs a research document according to a preset template.

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Information Technology, Science & Education, Finance & Trade
**Category**: Service, Operations, Management
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Agent, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Text Generation

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: 3.5-5 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 business expert, 1 algorithm engineer

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Low efficiency of manual research: Completing a full research report, such as an industry report or competitive analysis report, usually requires professional researchers to spend 1-3 weeks collecting, organizing, analyzing, and writing materials

- Difficult information integration: When facing massive information sources, manual filtering and integration can easily miss important content, and it is difficult to ensure the accuracy and timeliness of information
- Inconsistent report formats: Different people and institutions have very different writing styles and layout requirements, affecting report standardization and consistency

- High update and maintenance costs: Market conditions change rapidly, so manually updating and maintaining research report versions requires continuous investment; building a research team or inviting experts also adds extra cost

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Internet-wide data collection: Automatically collects relevant materials across the internet based on user-entered topics and keywords
- Information integration and analysis: Extracts key information from collected candidate materials and generates viewpoints and summaries
- Automatic report generation: Automatically generates structured research documents according to preset templates

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - Leading performance: Ranked No. 2 among open-source solutions on DeepResearch Bench, with stable and trustworthy generated content suitable for formal business decision-making scenarios.
- Faster generation: A single report is completed in <=15 minutes, significantly faster than comparable solutions, which generally take >=20 minutes.
- Lower cost: Supports cost-effective mainstream large models while maintaining performance, reducing overall cost by more than 60%.
- Enterprise-ready: Template fit is >=95% and format compliance is >=99%, enabling direct use in internal reporting and external materials.

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Single-document research accuracy: Report template fit >=95% and format compliance >=99%, improving processes such as format revision
- Single-document review time: Reduced to within 15 minutes (manual work requires 1 week), supporting large-scale and stable batch generation
- Single-document labor cost: Combined with the efficiency indicators above and the technical indicators below, manual operation and review cost can be reduced by 95%, improving user experience
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Comprehensive evaluation of single-document research performance: DeepResearch Bench comprehensive score >=51, ensuring the credibility of generated reports
